content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reframed as a nested, self-updating 'agent within an agent' system, where the memory module itself acts as an independent curiosity-driven agent that proactively queries the main agent for unlabeled experience data to improve its own retrieval and retention performance. This lets memory evolve to prioritize high-uncertainty, high-impact past experiences instead of statically storing whatever the main agent encounters.
